info.title: HeyClaude MCP Server API
info.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Claude Pro Directory. Provides tools, resources, and prompts for accessing directory content. Protocol version: 2025-11-25.

post.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 endpoint for MCP protocol. All tool calls, resource requests, and prompt requests are sent to this single endpoint.

get.description: Returns server health status and version information
OAuth 2.1 authorization endpoint (proxies to Supabase Auth). Adds RFC 8707 resource parameter for MCP compliance. Validates PKCE, response_type, and redirect_uri before forwarding to Supabase Auth.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI where authorization code will be sent

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Opaque value used to maintain state between request and callback

parameters.name: code_challenge_method
parameters.description: PKCE code challenge method (must be S256)

302.description: Redirect to Supabase Auth OAuth 2.1 Server with resource parameter

400.description: Invalid request (missing parameters, invalid response_type, missing PKCE, etc.)

post.description: OAuth 2.1 token exchange endpoint (proxies to Supabase Auth)

code.description: Authorization code received from authorization endpoint

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI used in authorization request

200.description: Token response with access token, refresh token, and metadata

refresh_token.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expires_in.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

400.description: Invalid request (missing parameters, invalid grant type, etc.)

post.description: OAuth 2.1 token revocation endpoint (RFC 7009). Proxies to Supabase Auth OAuth 2.1 Server. Always returns 200 per RFC 7009 to prevent token enumeration attacks.

token.description: Access token or refresh token to revoke

token_type_hint.description: Optional hint about the token type

200.description: Token revocation successful (always returns 200 per RFC 7009, even if token does not exist)

post.description: OAuth 2.1 token introspection endpoint (RFC 7662). Proxies to Supabase Auth OAuth 2.1 Server. Allows resource servers to validate tokens and retrieve token metadata.

token.description: Access token or refresh token to introspect

token_type_hint.description: Optional hint about the token type

active.description: Whether the token is active (valid and not expired)

client_id.description: Client identifier that issued the token

sub.description: Subject (user ID) associated with the token

aud.description: Audience (resource) the token is intended for

post.description: OAuth 2.1 dynamic client registration endpoint (RFC 7591). Proxies to Supabase Auth OAuth 2.1 Server. Allows clients to register themselves automatically without manual setup.

redirect_uris.description: Array of redirect URIs for the client

client_uri.description: URL of the client home page

scope.description: Space-separated list of scopes the client will request

tos_uri.description: URL of the client terms of service

policy_uri.description: URL of the client privacy policy

grant_types.description: Grant types the client will use

response_types.description: Response types the client will use

client_secret.description: Client secret (if client_secret_post auth method used)

client_secret_expires_at.description: Client secret expiration timestamp (0 if no expiration)

grant_types.description: Grant types supported by the client

response_types.description: Response types supported by the client

listCategoriesInput.description: List all content categories in the HeyClaude directory with counts and descriptions

searchContentInput.description: Search content with query, category, tags, and pagination. Returns formatted results with metadata.

getContentDetailInput.description: Get complete metadata for a specific content item by slug and category. Includes full description, tags, author info, and stats.

getTrendingInput.description: Get trending content across categories or within a specific category. Sorted by popularity and engagement.

getFeaturedInput.description: Get featured and highlighted content from the homepage. Includes hero items, latest additions, and popular content.

getPopularInput.description: Get popular content across categories or within a specific category. Sorted by views and engagement metrics.

getRecentInput.description: Get recently added content (optionally filtered by category). Shows items added within the last 30 days.

getTemplatesInput.description: Get content submission templates for creating new content. Includes field definitions, requirements, and examples.

getCategoryConfigsInput.description: Get category-specific configurations and features. Helps understand category-specific requirements and submission guidelines.

getChangelogInput.description: Get changelog of content updates in LLMs.txt format. Helps AI agents understand recent changes and stay current.

getSearchFacetsInput.description: Get available search facets (categories, tags, authors) for filtering content. Helps AI agents understand what filters are available.

limit.description: Number of suggestions to return (1-20, default: 10)

getSearchSuggestionsInput.description: Get search suggestions based on query history. Helps discover popular searches and provides autocomplete functionality for AI agents.

getMcpServersInput.description: Get MCP servers from the HeyClaude directory with metadata, download URLs, and configuration details.

getRelatedContentInput.description: Get related content for a given slug and category. Uses similarity matching based on tags and content.

getContentByTagInput.description: Get content filtered by specific tags with AND/OR logic support. Can optionally filter by category.

downloadContentForPlatformInput.description: Download content formatted for a specific platform (Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT Codex, or generic). Returns formatted content with installation instructions.

getSocialProofStatsInput.description: Get community statistics including top contributors, recent submissions, success rate, and total user count. Provides social proof data for engagement.

submission_type.description: Type of content to submit (required for complete submission)

description.example: A comprehensive framework for building AI agents

content_data.description: Content data object (structure varies by type)

submitContentInput.description: Guide users through content submission using MCP elicitation. Collects submission data step-by-step and provides submission instructions with pre-filled URLs.

provider.description: OAuth provider to use for account creation (default: "github")

newsletterOptIn.description: Whether to automatically subscribe to newsletter (default: false)

redirectTo.description: Optional: Path to redirect to after account creation (e.g., "/account")

createAccountInput.description: Provides OAuth URLs and instructions for creating an account. Supports newsletter opt-in during account creation.

referrer.description: Optional: Referrer URL or source identifier

subscribeNewsletterInput.description: Subscribes a user to the newsletter via Inngest. Sends event to Inngest which handles email validation, Resend audience sync, database subscription, welcome email, and drip campaign enrollment.

slug.description: Slug identifier of the skill to download

rootUri.description: Optional: Root URI for file download. If not provided, returns download URL.

downloadSkillPackageInput.description: Downloads a Skills ZIP file from Supabase Storage. If rootUri is provided, writes to client filesystem using Roots. Otherwise, returns download URL for manual download.

slug.description: Slug identifier of the MCP server to download

rootUri.description: Optional: Root URI for file download. If not provided, returns download URL.

downloadMcpServerPackageInput.description: Downloads an MCP server .mcpb file from Supabase Storage. If rootUri is provided, writes to client filesystem using Roots. Otherwise, returns download URL for manual download.

slug.description: Slug identifier of the content to download

rootUri.description: Optional: Root URI for file download. If not provided, returns download URL.

fileType.description: Optional: File type hint for better handling

downloadStorageFileInput.description: Generic tool for downloading any storage file from Supabase Storage. Supports Skills ZIPs, MCP server .mcpb files, and future storage file types. If rootUri is provided, writes to client filesystem using Roots. Otherwise, returns download URL for manual download.

contentResource.description: Export content in various formats (llms.txt, markdown, json, rss, atom). Supports all content categories.

categoryResource.description: Export all content in a category in various formats (llms.txt, markdown, json, rss, atom).

sitewideResource.description: Export all content across all categories in various formats (llms.txt, markdown, json, rss, atom).

submit-content-guideArgs.description: Step-by-step guide for submitting new content to the Claude Pro Directory. Provides instructions, requirements, and best practices for each content type.

format-content-for-platformArgs.description: Instructions for formatting content for specific platforms (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) with installation steps and configuration examples.

search-optimization-tipsArgs.description: Tips and best practices for optimizing search queries to find content more effectively in the Claude Pro Directory.

mcp-server-setup-guideArgs.description: Complete guide on setting up, configuring, and using MCP servers from the directory, including installation and integration steps.

content-submission-best-practicesArgs.description: Best practices, guidelines, and tips for submitting high-quality content that gets accepted and helps the community.

resource-access-guideArgs.description: Guide on accessing and using MCP resources, including content exports, category exports, and sitewide exports in various formats.
